channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Dogecoin gains Paxos support in push for broader institutional adoption
item.description: The integration gives fintech and institutional platforms a new pathway to evaluate DOGE amid signs of slowing crypto adoption.

item.title: Debate on CLARITY Act continues this week as US Senate returns
item.description: Many Democratic lawmakers have said that they will not support any version of a crypto market structure bill without provisions on ethics to address potential conflicts of interest by elected officials.

item.title: TON Price Pumps After Telegram CEO Says Token Will Be Rebranded to Gram
item.description: Telegram is taking the reins of The Open Network, years after abandoning the project—and it plans to adopt Toncoin's originally planned name.

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX Warns $1.75 Billion IPO Investors of Potential Future Share Dilution
item.description: SpaceX's amended IPO filing signals the company may issue substantial new shares in future transactions as Elon Musk expands its ambitions.

item.title: Trump’s Business Partner Teases Future Meme Coin Plans: 'We’re The Biggest Brand on Earth'
item.description: Bill Zanker, a longtime Trump associate, will take the top 19 holders of the president’s meme coin to the World Cup Finals next month—and has plans for ongoing exclusive events.

item.title: Crypto investment firm Keyrock is acquiring bankrupt lender Blockfills
item.description: The Brussels-based digital asset services firm plans to purchase BlockFills months after the Chicago-based company filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy, if a court approves.

item.title: Bitcoin volatility is down 56% but analysts still expect up to 20% BTC price move
item.description: Bitcoin’s sharp volatility decline coincides with a 114-day trading range, setting the stage for a potential 10% to 20% price move, but the direction remains uncertain.

item.title: Strategy's Bitcoin Sale Timing Throws $50 Million Polymarket Bet Into Dispute
item.description: Polymarket users are waiting for a resolution on whether Strategy's Bitcoin sale took place before the end of May—with over $50 million bet so far.

item.title: Kalshi Eyes Perpetual Futures for XRP, Solana, Dogecoin—And These Altcoins
item.description: Kalshi moved swiftly to lock down an emerging market for perpetual futures in the U.S., filing to certify a slate of altcoin offerings

item.title: Japan’s ruling party pushes crypto ETFs, yen-denominated stablecoins
item.description: The Parliamentary Association for the Promotion of Blockchain delivered recommendations to Japan’s finance minister on crypto and blockchain.

item.title: Florida Sues OpenAI, Sam Altman Over ChatGPT Safety Claims
item.description: Florida's attorney general seeks damages, restrictions on ChatGPT, and personal liability for OpenAI CEO Sam Altman in what the state describes as the first state-led lawsuit against the AI company.

item.title: Strategy's BTC sale turns Bitcoin treasury into market stress test
item.description: Strategy’s 32 BTC transaction has sparked debate over how investors value Bitcoin treasury companies as capital structure and liquidity considerations evolve.

item.title: Sell Coinbase Before Derivatives Squeeze Crypto Giant, Says Compass Point
item.description: Compass Point analysts reiterated a bearish $140 price target for Coinbase, warning of fierce competition in the derivatives space.

item.title: Crypto funds suffer second-largest outflows of 2026 while XRP and HYPE attract inflows
item.description: Investors pulled $1.67 billion from digital asset investment products last week, with bitcoin funds posting their largest weekly outflow of the year, according to a recent report from CoinShares.

item.title: Saylor's Strategy sold bitcoin for the first time since 2022. These firms are still buying
item.description: With Strategy breaking its accumulation streak and many peers stepping aside, the list of active digital asset treasuries has narrowed considerably.

item.title: It's not 2022 anymore: What Strategy's first bitcoin sale can (and can't) tell us about this one
item.description: Michael Saylor's Strategy has evolved into a far more complex bitcoin-finance machine since it last sold BTC three and half years ago.

item.title: Ethereum's Vitalik Buterin is rethinking how DeFi handles market crashes
item.description: In a research post published Monday, Buterin proposed creating index-tracking assets using options contracts rather than the debt-based structures that underpin much of DeFi today.

item.title: Build Fully Onchain Perps on Solana
item.description: Solana Foundation supports teams building onchain perps, other derivatives, and the applications around them.

item.title: Tom Lee's BitMine Buys $52 Million in Ethereum as Strategy Sells Bitcoin
item.description: A week after notching its largest purchase of 2026, BitMine was back in the order books, accumulating more Ethereum.

item.title: AI Giant Anthropic Files to Go Public After Nearing $1 Trillion Valuation
item.description: Claude maker Anthropic said Monday that it confidentially filed to launch an IPO in the U.S. following another huge funding round.

item.title: Michael Saylor breaks silence after Strategy sells $2.5 million in bitcoin
item.description: Michael Saylor says Strategy aims to make STRC the world's best credit instrument after the company sold bitcoin to help fund preferred stock distributions

item.title: Strategy sparks panic with bitcoin sale, but analysts say it was 'immaterial'
item.description: The move suggests a greater willingness on the part of Michael Saylor and Strategy to use BTC holdings to support the capital structure, said one analyst, while others disagreed.

item.title: Strategy Shares Slide Following Bitcoin Sale—Will It Dump More BTC Ahead?
item.description: Strategy sold Bitcoin, sparking jitters among investors and raising questions among analysts toward the prospect of future sales.

item.title: Are Ethereum OGs jumping ship? Here's what the data says
item.description: Long-term whales have cashed out millions of dollars from Ethereum following the recent sell-off, potentially putting ETH at risk of further losses.

item.title: Whitehat Helps Recover $2M in ETH Stuck Since 2016 ICO
item.description: A whitehat developer helped return funds from HongCoin's failed 2016 token sale after a bug left investor refunds frozen for nine years.

item.title: JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $71,000 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5CQ1BnUkdQdzlxQ09Ka196cTJMZGZlOGdWS19vUV9UZDFlUzdfemFUUTNnOUhaNXdtbVZvVmVITEZMM2dfel81QWItUG1YN1c3blIwT21UbHhCd2VQRXUwamNn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Bitcoin falls under $71,0…

item.title: Sui Blames Last Week's Trio of Network Outages on Gas and Validator Bugs
item.description: The Sui blockchain suffered three separate failures in 48 hours due to gas calculation bugs and validator synchronization issues.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Strategy’s bitcoin sale sparks a $14 million betting chaos on Polymarket
item.description: The 8-K filing by Strategy Monday disclosed sales for the period May 26 to May 31, but the disclosure was issued on June 1. Polymarket's May 31 contract is sitting at 81% Yes and in review, while bettors argue over whether the onchain tran…

item.title: Hyperliquid's HYPE breakout puts $100 price target in play
item.description: HYPE has entered the breakout stage of its prevailing bull pennant setup with an upside target near $105, with strong fundamentals backing the bullish case.

item.title: Binance Opens Access to 7,000 US Stocks, Prepares Tokenized 'bStocks' Rollout
item.description: Binance opened equities trading and previewed "bStocks," with experts split over whether tokenization unlocks growth or layers on new risk.

item.title: Bitcoin Falls to 2-Month Low After Strategy Sells BTC, ETFs Flip Negative for the Year
item.description: Strategy made its first BTC sale since 2022 as Bitcoin ETFs shed billions over the last two weeks, nudging the price down even lower.

item.title: Recovery hopes fade as Kelp DAO hacker launders nearly all $220M in stolen funds
item.description: The Kelp DAO exploiter laundered about $220 million worth of remaining stolen funds in a bid to make them untraceable, excluding the $71 million frozen by Arbitrum’s Security Council.

item.title: Morning Minute: HYPE Soars as CFTC Gives Perps Green Light
item.description: Kalshi got the formal approval, but it's Hyperliquid that caught the most buzz with a massive move over the weekend.

item.title: Plenty of narratives to justify why Bitcoin is dropping right now, but it often drops into June of midterm years. I know the four year cycle view is mocked frequently, but it has been far more accurate than every other theory put out there. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE0tVlY3Sk1zeVQtRVVzUGotRlZZY2dwNzFpTTFxR0VybUlNWTRaVGNfNGh1TTFRU2ZZWU5FVXFiNnN5ZklZQjctaDJ0QkpZc0VvMmJTMDliMDAtRHQ5MERUcHVHbEM?oc=5" target="_blank">Plenty of narratives to justify…

item.title: Strategy sells 32 BTC in first Bitcoin sale since 2022; Stock falls on open
item.description: The world's largest public Bitcoin holder reduced its stash to 843,706 BTC, while raising $128.3 million through Class A stock sales.

item.title: Japan's ruling party supports crypto ETF trading, yen-based stablecoins
item.description: Japan's ruling Liberal Democratic Party said the country should create a legal framework for trading crypto ETFs in a proposal to the finance minister.

item.title: Last week $MSTR sold 32 Bitcoin for about $2.5 million at an average price of $77,135. Since Bitcoin's biggest buyer has now become a seller, where will the new demand come from to sustain the pyramid? Bitcoin is already below $72K, which is about 7% be - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE8tOW5TbGZwVDlvMGR1T2hoQnpFNWJjMHhFYjhrNmJrUFd0SHY4QkN6ekV6UU5nSm9oc1pLZHNhX09DbVkwdXB5LWFtTW5xXzJTdUdudkllcDI1bVFvVzdTT1pR?oc=5" target="_blank">Last week $MSTR sold 32 Bitcoin fo…

item.title: Gnosis Pay exploit hits delay module as team pledges refunds
item.description: Gnosis Pay faces an active exploit in its delay module as co‑founder Martin Köppelmann walks back a warning urging users to withdraw funds and vows to repay those affected.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Stellar (XLM) surges 14.1% over weekend
item.description: Binance Coin (BNB), up 7.9%, was also a top performer.

item.title: Bitmine slows ether purchase pace, buying $53 million worth last week
item.description: The Ethereum treasury firm cut weekly purchases by more than 75% after the previous week's 112,000 ETH buying spree.

item.title: Crypto meets Wall Street: MEXC unveils 'RealStocks' with 0-fee U.S. equity trading and real dividends
item.description: MEXC, a leading 0-fee cross-asset trading platform, today announced the official launch of 'RealStocks.'

item.title: Live markets: Bitcoin retreats under $72,000 as Strategy unloads BTC for first time in four years
item.description: Crypto markets continue to struggle even as risk markets across the globe surge higher.

item.title: BREAKING: Bitcoin falls below $72,000 for the first time since April 13th. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBfeUZhNmhIbHRnRXZ3eTRvS3ltb1J4UWwwekxTbWFSV0FPMV9UcG1nY0gzM254c1BLYVN4XzdZeEVuUjRwY1BTMUpXczZBSDFJeXRxNjl6cU9YcTdqdUpfdmQ4cEdWQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Bitcoin falls belo…

item.title: Michael Saylor's Bitcoin Treasury Firm Strategy Sells 32 BTC for $2.5M
item.description: Bitcoin tumbled to $72,000 Monday as news of the BTC treasury firm's about-face on its "never sell" stance broke.

item.title: Strategy (Micro) sells Bitcoin, $2.5 million. May have to reevaluate pro-bitcoin stance given how much Strategy has propped it up. Key trampoline for years. Some say manipulation. I think that's too strong - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE9VWUVrLWxtcGRMdEdEU0tzS1AwZHZoTlY2Z1F3YmZHQTZNREdxT05hVVFNM2IzZW9FRGg1NlhFaUtwSG5peTVqdl9JRVZIRHJKQVVNYzh1OGM2c2YxZHJB?oc=5" target="_blank">Strategy (Micro) sells Bitcoin, $2.5 m…

item.title: Michael Saylor's Strategy sold 32 bitcoin for $2.5 million to fund dividend payments
item.description: The 8-K filing Monday says proceeds from the May 26-31 sale, executed at an average price of $77,135 a coin, will fund distributions on Strategy's preferred stock.

item.title: BREAKING: Michael Saylor's 'Strategy' sold 32 Bitcoin worth $2.5 million. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE93d1BhZUR5b1ZPNjhJd2IyYmYyRVpWeHEwWlQzZjFpVXVLeTVMbndCLW5HTTQ3QkxOS3B1M2RrNG9vd2Vtd0t5blBZX25vU19YWFp3cWFNMXBsdFpEWFczSk1B?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: Michael Saylor's 'Strate…

item.title: Bitcoin ETPs post largest 2026 outflow as crypto funds bleed $1.67B
item.description: Crypto ETPs see $1.67 billion in outflows as the US dominates selling, Bitcoin funds log a record 2026 exit, and altcoin participation narrows sharply across markets, according to CoinShares.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF Losses Near $3B Across 10 Days as YTD Flows Turn Negative
item.description: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs extended their outflow streak to 10 days, as crypto markets contend with multiple simultaneous headwinds.

item.title: Binance adds US stock trading in push beyond crypto
item.description: Binance launched US equities trading for eligible users and plans tokenized stocks as crypto exchanges expand into broader financial markets.

item.title: ECB official says stablecoins risk importing old market flaws
item.description: ECB board member Isabel Schnabel warned that stablecoins could bring money-market risks into tokenized finance and reinforce US dollar dominance.

item.title: Bitcoin remains under pressure as ETF outflows, higher oil prices weigh on crypto markets
item.description: Your day-ahead look for June 1, 2026

item.title: Coinbase Launches Direct Indian Rupee Deposit and Withdrawal Rails
item.description: The U.S. exchange has established direct rupee trading rails for Indian customers after securing regulatory clearance.

item.title: Cardano Summit 2026 canceled after community votes against Foundation funding proposal
item.description: The Cardano Foundation's flagship conference was scrapped after a funding proposal failed to secure the two-thirds support required under the blockchain's new governance system.

item.title: Strategy holds STRC dividend at 11.5% for fourth straight month
item.description: The preferred stock remains near its $100 par value as the company balances yield stability, ATM issuance capacity, and its bitcoin acquisition strategy.

item.title: Bitcoin, ether start June in the red while futures show taste for risk. XLM, HYPE gain
item.description: Bitcoin and ether fell Monday after dropping in May, a month that usually sees them post positive returns. U.S. equity index futures rose.
